name: world-cup-live-pulse
description: Fan-first live and replay dashboard for World Cup match pulse, events, market movement, and AI commentary.

scripts.validate: tsc --noEmit && node scripts/validate-fixtures.mjs && node scripts/validate-i18n.mjs && node scripts/audit-product-data.mjs && node scripts/test-score-challenge.mjs && node scripts/test-world-cup-scope.mjs && node scripts/test-txline-score-normalization.mjs && node scripts/test-ai-match-brief.mjs && node scripts/test-speech-voice.mjs && node scripts/test-txline-archive.mjs && node scripts/test-vercel-txline-proxy.mjs && node scripts/preflight.mjs && node scripts/security-scan.mjs && node --experimental-vm-modules scripts/test-txline-subscribe-helper.mjs
